feed.title: liammulh.github.io
feed.subtitle: Liam Mulhall's blog on software engineering, computer science, mathematics, writing, and anything else that floats his boat

entry.title: What is Backus-Naur form (BNF) and how is it used? What is the history behind it? What are the differences between BNF and its derivatives? This blog post attempts to answer these questions.
entry.summary: What is Backus-Naur form (BNF) and how is it used? What is the history behind it? What are the differences between BNF and its derivatives? This blog post attempts to answer these questions.
